LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS HEIDI TAN AND GARY SNG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 26, 2012 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS HEIDI TAN, GARY SNG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR ALTERNATIVELY, FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AGAINST PASQUALE IANNETTI ART GALLERIES, INC. ON THE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AND RESCISSION BASED UPON MISTAKE AND DENIED AS TO PASQUALE IANNETTI ART GALLERIES, INC. ON THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD AND AS TO MR. PASQUALE IANNETTI ON ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. PASQUALE IANNETTI ART GALLERIES, INC. DEFENDANTS CONCEDE THAT THE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AND RESCISSION BASED UPON MISTAKE ARE MERITORIOUS AS TO PASQUALE IANNETTI ART GALLERIES, INC. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE REGARDING SCIENTER ON THE FRAUD CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PRESENT A BASIS FOR LIABILITY AGAINST MR. PASQUALE IANNETTI ON THE BREACH OF CONTRACT AND RESCISSION CAUSES OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED. (302/HEK) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS HEIDI TAN, GARY SNG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR ALTERNATIVELY, FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.
Appearances: Jaemin Chang of Ropers Majeski Kohn & Bentley (543.4800) for plaintiffs and moving parties; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: the motion for summary judgment is denied as to both defendants. The motion for summary adjudication is granted against Pasquale Iannetti Art Galleries, Inc. on the causes of action for breach of contract and rescission based upon mistake and denied as to Pasquale Iannetti Art Galleries, Inc. on the cause of action for fraud and as to Mr. Pasquale Iannetti on all causes of action. Pasquale Iannetti Art Galleries, Inc. Defendants concede that the causes of action for breach of contract and rescission based upon mistake are meritorious as to Pasquale Iannetti Art Galleries, Inc. There is a triable issue regarding scienter on the fraud cause of action against both defendants. Plaintiff fails to present a basis for liability against Mr. Pasquale Iannetti on the breach of contract and rescission causes of action. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-20-2012 Continued To Apr-26-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
